gpt55_review_summary: APPROVED by GPT-5.5 after resolving typed facade, release-gate, legacy alias, and submodule API findings; final design is a root-only Cachet facade.
verification: PYTHONPATH=src python runtime smoke for cachet root API, no cachet.storage, and no RestaurantKVRequest
poetry run pytest tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_release_bundle.py -q -> 89 passed
poetry build -> built sdist and wheel
wheel inspection confirmed cachet/__init__.py, cachet/__init__.pyi, cachet/py.typed, document_kv_cache/py.typed, restaurant_kv_serving/py.typed in wheel and RECORD
entry point inspection confirmed cachet, document-kv, and restaurant-kv CLI aliases
MYPYPATH=src mypy root Cachet import smoke with --disallow-any-expr -> success
MYPYPATH=src mypy negative RestaurantKVRequest import -> expected attr-defined error
what_changed: Added a typed cachet root import facade, packaged Cachet stub and py.typed marker, documented the facade scope, and taught release-bundle wheel validation to require Cachet runtime/stub/typed files.
why: Advance the Cachet brand and premium root import while preserving the canonical document_kv_cache implementation namespace, existing document-kv scripts, and legacy restaurant_kv_serving compatibility package.
